title: Technical documentation snippet
description: Tech writing — precise, structured, with technical terms
text: The API returns a JSON response with three fields: status, data, and error. If status equals "ok", the data field contains the requested resource. Otherwise, error provides a human-readable message and an error code.
tips: Technical writing has consistent terminology — same words repeat
Colons signal structure: ok with them and you're a tech writer
Code-ish terms (API, JSON) should flow as words, not letter-by-letter

character_tips.anna: Technical docs are everywhere in modern work. Master the rhythm.
character_tips.maxim: Engineers write more than they code. Tech prose = career skill.
character_tips.knopych: TECH MODE! ⚙️ JSON, API, all the buzzwords!
character_tips.klavochka: Clear and precise, like recipe instructions, my dear 📋
